description: A new ship model, the 'MV Gladiator', has been added to the simulator but has incorrect performance physics. Calibrate its configuration file at /opt/bridgecommand/Models/Ship/MV_Gladiator/dynamics.ini using the 'Sea_Trials_Report_2025.txt' and 'Sim_Physics_Tech_Note.txt' found in the Documents folder. Convert the ship's dimensions (Length and Beam) from feet to meters, and calculate the 'RudderArea' and 'DragArea' based on the provided formulas and data. Update the dynamics.ini file with these values, ensuring the 'Description' field includes 'Calibrated 2025'. Create a summary of the applied values at /home/ga/Documents/calibration_certificate.txt.
